use_cases: Hero section for SaaS landing pages promoting AI-powered sales solutions
Marketing banner for AI agent and multi-channel engagement platforms
Product announcement section for SaaS companies
Call-to-action banner for sales automation tools
ai_summary: A clean, responsive hero banner component featuring a background image, white text typography, a subtle gradient divider line, and a centered CTA button. Designed for SaaS marketing pages to promote AI workforce and sales automation solutions. Uses Poppins font and includes hover scale animation on the button.
